cadence_items.public_safe_note: Re-read the local decision context before choosing a next action; no decision execution is authorized.
Separate assumptions from evidence before continuing; no assumption becomes proof.
Re-check deployment, money, legal, customer, publication, secret, and external-boundary blockers.
Point only to public-safe local artifacts; no private paths, accounts, customers, providers, reviewers, or secrets are recorded.
Pause if the next action is broad, irreversible, external, money-related, legal, customer-facing, publication-facing, or deployment-facing.
Choose one reversible local next action only; no roadmap, delivery date, support rhythm, or external commitment is promised.

next_action: continue non-binding local review cadence; do not execute decisions, authorize irreversible action, commit to a roadmap, promise deadlines, delegate authority, make customer commitments, claim legal authority, form a company, file a patent, spend money, publish externally, or deploy
review_cadence_scope: public-safe local review rhythm for rechecking context, assumptions, constraints, evidence references, stop rules, and one reversible next action without commitments
